Class CampbellClass

  • java.lang.Object
    • CampbellClass
  • public class CampbellClass
extends java.lang.Object
    epic utility class (very useful)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double convertMetersToCenti​(double a)
      converts double meters to double centimeters
      static int convertMetersToCenti​(int a)
      converts int meters to int centimeters
      static java.lang.String convertString​(boolean a)
      converts a boolean to a string
      static java.lang.String convertString​(char a)
      converts a char to a string
      static java.lang.String convertString​(double a)
      converts a double to a string
      static java.lang.String convertString​(int a)
      converts an int to a string
      static java.lang.String removeNonAlpha​(java.lang.String a)
      removes all non alpha characters from a string
      static java.lang.String removeNonAlpha​(java.lang.String a, boolean b)
      removes all non alpha characters from the string also accepts a boolean input to convert to upper/lowercase

      • convertMetersToCenti

        public static int convertMetersToCenti​(int a)
        converts int meters to int centimeters
        Parameters:
        a - integer to convert
        Returns:
        returns a as an integer in cm

      • convertMetersToCenti

        public static double convertMetersToCenti​(double a)
        converts double meters to double centimeters
        Parameters:
        a - double to convert
        Returns:
        returns a in double cm

      • removeNonAlpha

        public static java.lang.String removeNonAlpha​(java.lang.String a)
        removes all non alpha characters from a string
        Parameters:
        a - the string to remove characters from
        Returns:
        the string with all nonalpha characters removed

      • removeNonAlpha

        public static java.lang.String removeNonAlpha​(java.lang.String a,
                                              boolean b)
        removes all non alpha characters from the string also accepts a boolean input to convert to upper/lowercase
        Parameters:
        a - String to modify
        b - boolean, if true, convert a to uppercase, otherwise lowercase
        Returns:
        returns the resulting string after case conversion and character removals
